pages.text: Every Skyseed is crafted, then thrown. Each small island stacks four blocks — a 2x2 of surface over base; the larger isles take a 3x3. Here is how to make each one, and where to find what it takes. Craft a seed to unlock its field notes.
The $(item)Forest Skyseed$() — dirt and planks, both off your $(bold)starter island$(). The first seed you can make.
The $(item)Large Forest Skyseed$() — any logs and dirt. Fell a $(item)forest$() first; bigger and pricier.
The $(item)Rocky Skyseed$() — stone and cobblestone. Dig into the $(bold)core$() of any grassy island.
The $(item)Large Rocky Skyseed$() — stone and cobblestone from any core. A tall mountain that yields $(item)emeralds$().
The $(item)Desert Skyseed$() — sand and sandstone. Sand comes off a $(bold)beach or desert$() throw; craft it into sandstone.
The $(item)Large Desert Skyseed$() — more sand and sandstone. A vast dune field hiding an oasis.
The $(item)Mushroom Skyseed$() — dirt and both mushrooms. They sprout on a $(bold)Forest island's$() shady dark-oak or spruce floor.
The $(item)Large Mushroom Skyseed$() — both mushrooms again, grown into a giant grove.
The $(item)Frozen Skyseed$() — snow and ice. Gather them off a $(bold)snowy island$() — or a Rocky island's snow-capped peak (thrown high or over cold).
The $(item)Large Frozen Skyseed$() — snow and packed ice. Snowy or icy by biome, with a frozen lake over frozen ones.
The $(item)Meadow Skyseed$() — dirt and any flower. Pick flowers off a $(bold)Forest or flower-forest$() island.
The $(item)Large Meadow Skyseed$() — dirt and flowers. A vast bloom — the best start for $(item)bees$().
The $(item)Badlands Skyseed$() — red sand and terracotta. Red sand comes from a $(bold)Desert seed thrown over a badlands$(); bake clay into terracotta.
The $(item)Large Badlands Skyseed$() — red sand and terracotta. A towering, banded mesa rich in gold.
The $(item)Ancient Skyseed$() — deepslate and cobbled deepslate. Dig the core of a $(bold)Rocky island thrown deep$(), down near the world's floor.
The $(item)Large Ancient Skyseed$() — deepslate from a deep Rocky throw. A huge slab of the deep — diamonds and geodes.
The $(item)Lush Skyseed$() — moss and azalea. Moss comes from an $(bold)Ancient island$(); the first azalea from a $(bold)Forest's$() bushes.
The $(item)Large Lush Skyseed$() — moss and azalea, grown into a bigger isle with a deep, glow-squid pool.
The $(item)Aquatic Skyseed$() — clay and sand. Both come from a $(bold)Desert island$(): clay in its core, sand on top.
The $(item)Large Aquatic Skyseed$() — clay and sand. A broad island around a proper deep lake.
The $(item)Hamlet Skyseed$() — planks, cobblestone and an $(item)emerald$() (mine a Rocky mountain for emeralds). A villager's cottage — the start of trading.
The $(item)Trade Post Skyseed$() — planks, cobblestone and $(item)3 emeralds$(). A plaza of shops, several trades in one throw.
The $(item)Village Center Skyseed$() — $(item)5 emeralds$(), an iron ingot, planks and cobblestone. All 13 professions and an iron golem — the whole economy in one throw.
The $(item)Pasture Skyseed$() — $(item)Wool$(), planks and dirt. A fenced field of cows, sheep or pigs.
$(italic)Same Pasture Skyseed$(), the other way: $(item)Raw Beef$() instead of wool. Whichever animal you caught first.
The $(item)Poultry Skyseed$() — a $(item)Feather$(), an $(item)Egg$() and dirt. A walled coop of chickens.
The $(item)Wool Farm Skyseed$() — $(item)2 Wool$(), an iron ingot and dirt. A flock in every colour.
The $(item)Stable Skyseed$() — $(item)Leather$(), a $(item)Gold Ingot$() and planks. Horses, and a chest that might hold a saddle.
The $(item)Aquarium Skyseed$() — a $(item)Turtle Scute$(), a $(item)Prismarine Shard$() and sand. A glass tank of turtles, axolotls and fish.
The $(item)Dungeon Skyseed$() — cobblestone around a piece of $(item)rotten flesh$(). A sealed spawner cube with two loot chests.
The $(item)Ruined Portal Skyseed$() — $(item)obsidian$() and a $(item)gold ingot$(). A broken portal with a chest of Nether spoils.
The $(item)Desert Temple Skyseed$() — $(item)sand$(), $(item)sandstone$() and $(item)TNT$(). Four chests over a pressure-plate trap.
The $(item)Jungle Temple Skyseed$() — $(item)jungle planks$(), $(item)mossy cobblestone$() and a $(item)tripwire hook$(). A trapped puzzle room.
The $(item)Witch Hut Skyseed$() — $(item)oak planks$(), a $(item)brown mushroom$() and a $(item)cauldron$(). A witch, a cat, and brewing drops.
$(bold)This Almanac$()$(br)Craft any single Skyseed on its own to turn it back into this book — so you'll never lose your way.
